title: Cubex Construct
move_pattern: Starts with Charge Up. Then cycles: Repeater Blast → Repeater Blast → Expel Blast → Repeater Blast → Repeater Blast → Expel Blast … repeating indefinitely. Submerge is in the state machine and transitions back to Charge Up if used, but nothing in the normal chain feeds into it — its activation trigger is external.
notes: Gains 13 [color=cyan]Block[/color] and 1 [color=gold]Artifact[/color] when entering combat. Both Charge Up and each Repeater Blast apply 2 [color=red]Strength[/color] to itself, causing attack damage to ramp quickly over a prolonged fight. Submerge is defined in the move list with a follow-up back to Charge Up, but no other state transitions into it — it is likely triggered by an external encounter mechanic not visible in this source file.
